title: Maybank Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer American Express Platinum Credit Card
miles_card_full_name: Maybank Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer American Express Platinum Credit Card
card_notes:
1 KrisFlyer mile for every RM 2.5 spent locally.
1 KrisFlyer mile for every RM 2 spent on online transactions and overseas.
1 KrisFlyer mile for every RM 1 spent on Singapore Airlines, Scoot & KrisShop website.
No Krisflyer Miles will be earned on Mycdd / Government Bodies / JomPay / FPX transactions and E-Wallet reloads.

title: Maybank Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer American Express® Gold Credit Card
miles_card_full_name: Maybank Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer American Express® Gold Credit Card

No Krisflyer Miles will be earned on Mycdd / Government Bodies / JomPay / FPX transactions and E-Wallet reloads

title: OCBC Premier Voyage Mastercard
card_notes:
Earn unlimited Voyage Miles that never expire every time you spend which can be redeemed for air tickets, cashback, staycations, shopping experiences and many more
Every 3,000 Voyage Miles converts to 1,000 KrisFlyer miles.

title: Maybank Visa Infinite Diamanté
card_notes:
Earn up to 2x TreatsPoints for every RM 1 spent locally.
Earn 5x TreatsPoints for every RM 1 spent overseas.
Earn 1x TreatsPoints on all transactions for petrol, utilities, education, EzyPay and insurance transactions.
No TreatsPoints will be rewarded on Mycdd / Government Bodies / JomPay / FPX transactions and E-Wallet reloads.
By INVITATION only.

title: Maybank The Platinum Card
card_notes:
arn 5X Membership Rewards for every RM1 spent on the American Express® Card in Malaysia or Overseas.
5X Membership Rewards™ for Petrol Transactions below RM500
For transactions above RM500, Cardmembers will receive 1X Membership Rewards™ for every RM1 spend.
Earn 1X Membership Rewards points for every Ringgit spent on Education Institutions, Insurance Provider will, Utilities, and Maybank EzyPay Installment.

title: Maybank American Express Platinum Credit Card
miles_card_full_name: Maybank American Express Platinum Credit Card
card_notes:
Earn 5x Membership Rewards™ points for every RM you spend on groceries, telecommunications, at selected cineplexes, petrol* and participating bookstores.
*5X Membership Rewards™ is capped at RM 500 per transaction and transaction above RM 500 will be awarded 1X Membership Rewards™ for every RM 1 spend.
Earn up to 2 Membership Rewards™ (MR) for every RM1 spent locally or overseas.
Earn 1x Membership Rewards™ Points for all utilities, education, EzyPay and insurance transactions.
NO expiry for Membership Rewards™
No Membership Rewards™ will be rewarded on Mycdd / Government Bodies / JomPay / FPX transactions and E-Wallet reloads.

title: HSBC Premier World Mastercard Credit Card
miles_card_full_name: HSBC Premier World Mastercard Credit Card
card_notes:
n addition to the 1x Reward Points, you also stand to receive Additional Reward Points for below category of spend subject to the Additional Reward Points Cap:
(a) 9x Additional Reward Points for Oversea spend (capped at 15,000 Additional Reward Points)
** 5x Additional Reward Points for Oversea spend if you meet the account minimum eligibility criteria for the account [total relationship balance (TRB) of RM 300,000, more details click HERE] for HSBC Premier (valid until 31st December 2026).
An Additional cap of 185,000 Rewards points will be grandted to you if you meet the account minimum eligibility criteria state in HERE. (valid until 31st December 2026).
All local spend, all Contactless Purchases, Online Spend, Insurance, and Utility Payment are excluded in the Additional Reward Points programme.
(b) 7x Additional Reward Points for Contactless Purchase (capped at 8,000 Additional Reward Points)
All Overseas Spend, Insurance and Utility Payments are excluded in the Additional Reward Points programme.
(c) 4x Additional Reward Points for Groceries (capped at 4,000 Additional Reward Points)
All Contactless Purchases, Overseas Spend, and Online Shopping are excluded in the Additional Reward Points programme.
(d) 4x Additional Reward Points for Online Shopping (capped at 4,000 Additional Reward Points)
All Overseas Spend made in foreign currency, Online Insurance and Utility Payments are excluded in the Additional Reward Points programme.
List of Participating Merchants for Online Shopping: Lazada, Fave, Grab, Shopee and Zalora.

title: HSBC Premier Travel Mastercard Credit Card
miles_card_full_name: HSBC Premier Travel Mastercard Credit Card
card_notes:
For Oversea spend,
Earn 1.1x air miles for every RM 1 spent overseas.
Capped at 20,000 Air miles.
Includes overseas spend made in foreign currency outside Malaysia, online transactions in foreign currency, insurance and utility payment
Exclude Petrol
For Local Spend,
Earn 1x air mile for every RM 4 spent locally.
Capped at 30,000 Air miles.
Includes all local spend made within Malaysia, including online transactions in local currency, insurance and utility payment.
Exclude Petrol.

title: HSBC TravelOne Credit Card
card_notes:
n addition to the 1x Reward Point, You also stand to receive Additional Reward Points for the below category of spend subject to the Additional Reward Points Cap
(a) 7x Additional Reward Points for Foreign Currency spend (capped at 20,000 Additional Reward Points)
(b) 4x Additional Reward Points for Local Travel spend for instance Hotel, Airlines and Travel Agencies (capped at 10,000 Additional Reward Points)
(c) 4x Additional Reward Points for Local Dining spend (capped at 10,000 Additional Reward Points)
Paying Insurance and Utilities by oversea currency are excluded in the Additional Reward Points programme. 
Paying Insurance and Utilities online or oversea currencies are excluded in the Additional Reward Points programme.

title: HSBC Visa Signature
card_notes:
In addition to the 1x Reward Point, You also stand to receive Additional Reward Points for the below category of spend subject to the Additional Reward Points Cap
(a) 7x Additional Reward Points for Oversea spend (capped at 15,000 Additional Reward Points)

(c) 4x Additional Reward Points for Online transaction (capped at 15,000 Additional Reward Points)
Paying Insurance and Utilities online or oversea currencies are excluded in the Additional Reward Points programme.

title: Standard Chartered Priority Banking Visa Infinite
miles_card_full_name: Standard Chartered Priority Banking Visa Infinite
card_notes:
For every RM 1 spent on local retail purchases posted on to Priority Banking Visa Infinite credit card, 1 point will be credited to your Priority Banking Visa Infinite credit card account.
For every RM 1 spent on overseas retail purchases posted on to Priority Banking Visa Infinite credit card, 5 points will be credited to your Priority Banking Visa Infinite credit card account.
Overseas retail purchases are defined as transactions performed outside of Malaysia in foreign currency.
Excluded Petrol Transaction.

title: Standard Chartered Journey Credit Card
card_notes:
For every RM 1 spent on dining, travel and overseas retail purchases posted on to Journey Credit Card, 1 Miles Points will be credited to your Journey Credit Card account.
The definitions of the purchases are as stated below;
(a) transactions made in Ringgit Malaysia at selected dining merchants with registered Merchant Category Code (MCC) of 5812 or 5813 or 5814 are defined as Dining Retail Purchases.
(b) transactions made in Ringgit Malaysia at Airline, hotel and online travel agent with MCCs of 3000 – 3299, 3501-3999, 4511, 4722, 7011, 7012 are defined as Travel Retail Purchases.
(c) transactions performed outside Malaysia in foreign currency are defined as Overseas Retail Purchases.
For every RM 5 spent on local retail purchases in Ringgit Malaysia posted on to Journey Credit Card, 1 Miles point will be credited to your Journey Card account.
Excluded Petrol Transaction, Utilities and eWallet.

title: UOB Visa Infinite Metal Card
card_notes:
Earn 10X UNIRM for every RM 1 spent on overseas.
Earn 5X UNIRM for every RM 1 spent on dining locally (min. spend RM 1,000 monthly)
Earn 1X UNIRM for other eligible transactions.
Transportation, Petrol, Top up transactions and Utilities spending are excluded from the UNIRM programme.
300,000 UNIRM Points (“Annual UNIRM Bonus”) for is valid Cards approved and/ or membership renewed.

any spend above RM 300 per merchant will earn 1X UNIRM per RM1 spent.

any spend above RM 3,000 will earn 1X UNIRM per RM1 spent.

title: CIMB Preferred Visa Infinite-i Credit Card
miles_card_full_name: CIMB Preferred Visa Infinite-i Credit Card
card_notes: 8x Bonus Points on dining and overseas spend (base 2x/1x + additional bonus points credited quarterly within 12 weeks, assumes AUM requirement met). 2x on other foreign currency transactions. 1x on other local retail. Petrol and eWallet excluded. Active campaign: earn up to 35,000 extra Bonus Points monthly (valid Oct 2025 – Sep 2026, subject to pool availability — check CIMB website). Minimum conversion: 5 blocks (62,500 Bonus Points = 5,000 Enrich Points).

title: CIMB Preferred Visa Infinite Credit Card

card_notes:

Tier 2: Earn 15,000 Bonus Points when you spend a minimum of RM 5,000 and above on Eligible Transactions per Campaign Month. Subject to a capping of 60,000,000 monthly Bonus Points pool.

card_notes: 10x Bonus Points on overseas and airlines spend. 2x on all other local retail. 1x on local education, insurance and utilities. Petrol and eWallet excluded. Minimum conversion: 5 blocks (62,500 Bonus Points = 5,000 Enrich Points).

title: CIMB e Credit Card
card_notes: Earn 12x Bonus Points on contactless transactions (dining, groceries, pharmacy, shopping, transport) and online purchases on eDay (28th of every month). Earns only 3x on all other days. Calculator assumes eDay spending. Monthly cap: 20,000 Bonus Points. Minimum conversion: 5 blocks (62,500 Bonus Points = 5,000 Enrich Points). Petrol, eWallet, airlines and insurance excluded.

card_notes:

title: Alliance Bank Visa Virtual
card_notes:
8x Timeless Bonus Points (TBP) with e-Commerce transactions and eWallet top-up.
(a) e-Commerce transaction is defined as transaction made via the Internet where the Merchant is an e-Commerce/online/Internet merchant based on POS Condition Code 59. For e-Commerce, any spend amount above RM 3,000 on each statement cycle, you will earn 1X TBP for every RM1 transaction.
(b) or e-Wallet top-up, any spend amount above RM 3,000 on each statement cycle, you will earn 1X TBP for every RM1 transaction.
Earn 1x TBP for every RM1 transaction for Instalment Payment Plan (IPP), Flexi Payment Plan (FPP), JomPay and FPX transactions.
